# Average Credit Card Debt in America - By State, Age & Income [2026]
> Average credit card debt in America by state, age, and income. Updated 2026 statistics from the Federal Reserve and Census data.

## About
averagecreditcarddebt.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Above Average Credit Card Debt? What to Do Next: https://averagecreditcarddebt.org/above-average.html
- Credit Card Debt by Age Group - Gen Z to Boomers (2024 Data): https://averagecreditcarddebt.org/by-age.html
- Credit Card Debt by Income Level - Who Carries the Most?: https://averagecreditcarddebt.org/by-income.html
- Average Credit Card Debt by State 2024 - All 50 States Ranked: https://averagecreditcarddebt.org/by-state.html
- FAQ - Credit Card Debt Statistics and Bankruptcy: https://averagecreditcarddebt.org/faq.html
- Average Credit Card Debt in America - By State, Age & Income: https://averagecreditcarddebt.org/
- The Minimum Payment Trap - How $6,500 Takes 18 Years to Pay Off - Credit Card Debt: https://averagecreditcarddebt.org/paying-minimums.html
- Credit Card Debt Statistics 2026 - Total US Credit Card Debt, Average APR, Delinquency Data: https://averagecreditcarddebt.org/statistics-2026.html
- Credit Card Debt Trends 2019-2025 - COVID, Inflation, and the Post-Pandemic Surge: https://averagecreditcarddebt.org/trends.html
- When Credit Card Debt Means It's Time for Bankruptcy: https://averagecreditcarddebt.org/when-to-file.html
- Privacy Policy: https://averagecreditcarddebt.org/privacy.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
